subject: Add appc cdt proxy to oom
commit_message:
Add appc cdt proxy to oom

Change to the appc startODL.sh script to startup the cdt
proxy service to allow backend connection from the cdt tool.

Adding a new port forward into the appc container for the
above service. External port 9090, internal port 9191

Change-Id: Ib13bb5744705ef3b2d3f5c9e9a73b26620c515c7
Signed-off-by: Patrick Brady <pb071s@att.com>
Issue-ID: APPC-924

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Hi Patrick

I verified and tested..
Please check bellow -

Additional changes required:

diff --git a/kubernetes/appc/templates/service.yaml b/kubernetes/appc/templates/service.yaml
index 6c85985..0ba73e3 100644
--- a/kubernetes/appc/templates/service.yaml
+++ b/kubernetes/appc/templates/service.yaml
@@ -31,6 +31,9 @@ spec:
     - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort2 }}
       nodePort: {{ .Values.global.nodePortPrefix | default .Values.nodePortPrefix }}{{ .Values.service.nodePort2 }}
       name: "{{ .Values.service.portName }}-1830"
+    - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort3 }}
+      nodePort: {{ .Values.global.nodePortPrefix | default .Values.nodePortPrefix }}{{ .Values.service.nodePort3 }}
+      name: "{{ .Values.service.portName }}-9090"
     {{- else -}}
     - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort }}
       targetPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort }}
@@ -38,6 +41,9 @@ spec:
     - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort2 }}
       targetPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort2 }}
       name: {{ .Values.service.portName }}-1830
+    - port: {{ .Values.service.externalPort3 }}
+      targetPort: {{ .Values.service.internalPort3 }}
+      name: {{ .Values.service.portName }}-9090
     {{- end}}
   selector:
     app: {{ include "common.name" . }}

Test Result:

Installation -->

Patch Set 2:

The cdt proxy service in the appc container is on port 9191, you need to make sure you have the changes to the startODL.sh file (also in this commit) in order to run that.

I need to make a change to the javascript in cdt so that it will connect to the correct kubernetes port instead of 9090, like it is now.
Uploaded patch set 3.
Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 3:

(1 comment)

Please try to test CDT can connect with appc application.

Patch Set 3:

Hi Patrick,

There two files bellow which you one you talking about?

root@dev8-appc-0:/# find -name "startODL.sh"
./opt/onap/ccsdk/bin/startODL.sh
./opt/onap/appc/bin/startODL.sh

Both are part of different config Map.

          - mountPath: /opt/onap/appc/bin/startODL.sh
            name: onap-appc-bin
            subPath: startODL.sh

        - name: onap-appc-bin
          configMap:
            name: {{ include "common.fullname" . }}-onap-appc-bin
            defaultMode: 0755
			
		Path in OOM -> resources/config/appc/opt/onap/appc/bin/
		

          - mountPath: /opt/onap/ccsdk/bin/startODL.sh
            name: onap-sdnc-bin
            subPath: startODL.sh
			
        - name: onap-sdnc-bin
          configMap:
            name: {{ include "common.fullname" . }}-onap-sdnc-bin
            defaultMode: 0755

		Path in OOM --> resources/config/appc/opt/onap/ccsdk/bin/
		
You changed file resources/config/appc/opt/onap/appc/bin/

I am not sure that same settings need to be included inside startODL in ccsdk.
after implementation of those changes still not able to locate port inside container. can you please check agian.

Thanks,
Mayank Gupta

Patch Set 3: Code-Review-1 Verified-1

(1 comment)

Patch Set 3:

Patrick, the issue that I'm seeing now is you've hardcoded that node port in the appc cdt config.... this port should be made configurable. It can't be hardcoded. https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/49201/

Patch Set 3:

The thing is, the node port prefix is meant to be a user discretion param. Say you want two ONAP deployments in one K8S cluster, nodePortSufix will be different

Patch Set 3: -Code-Review

> (1 comment)

If I put it back to node port 32, will that work then?
Uploaded patch set 4.

Patch Set 3:

Mayank, the jar file is there in the latest versions of the appc-image. Maybe you have an older version of the image downloaded.

Patch Set 3:

Alexis, I know the hardcoded port is an issue. I am just trying to get this working now, while I figure out a better way to do it.

Patch Set 4:

Ok, cool. Thanks

though, need to change configuration at CDT related to port.
